scripts.e2e:docker: docker build -f tools/devtest/Dockerfile -t telescope-devtest:local . && docker run --rm --init -t --ipc=host -v "$PWD":/repo -w /repo -e CI=1 -e PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/ms-playwright -e PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_BROWSER_DOWNLOAD=1 telescope-devtest:local bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; COREPACK_HOME=/repo/.corepack corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.4 --activate >/dev/null; ./scripts/pnpm.sh -C apps/web e2e:docker'
